Google sketches a lantern-based workspace trial

Google company-news fixture: a sample merchant workspace contains profile, reply, and demand panels.

Its invented control set pairs a summary card with editing actions available from Search and Maps.

Google uses a test merchant, a calendar exception, an inventory flag, and a message draft to exercise the article body.

The synthetic controls enter a staged regional rollout in this page scenario.
